title: Frontend: Question Editor Component
description: Build question editor component. Before type selection, show common parameters (symbol, collection selector, translations button). After type selection, show type-specific parameters. Question type selector with multi-select, select-one, free-text, range options. Visibility condition selector with link to formula editor popup. Options management for select-type questions. Translation editor integration.

statusHistory.comment: Planning phase complete. Implementation plan includes Question Editor with simultaneous editing support for collections, questions, and sections.

Implementation complete. Question Editor component built with OptionsEditor, QuestionTypeSpecificParams, QuestionList, QuestionForm, InlineCollectionCreator. 98 tests passing. Code review findings addressed.
